---
title : "Figure 5.4"
subtitle : "Comparison of step-sizes for SGD for logistic regression"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("../..")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using LinearAlgebra, Random, Statistics, CairoMakie
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
function run_experiment(n_total; seed=1, d=40, number_of_passes=50)
    rng = MersenneTwister(seed)

    # Generate H
    H_rand = randn(rng, d, d)
    U, _, _ = svd(H_rand)
    H = U * Diagonal(1.0 ./ (1:d)) * U'
    Hsqrt = U * Diagonal(1.0 ./ sqrt.(1:d)) * U'

    # Generate data
    X_all = randn(rng, n_total, d) * Hsqrt
    w0 = randn(rng, d)
    w0 = w0 / sqrt(dot(w0, H * w0))
    y_all = sign.(X_all * w0 + randn(rng, n_total))

    R2 = maximum(sum(X_all.^2, dims=2))

    # Split train/test
    n = div(n_total, 2)
    mu = R2 / n_total

    Xtest = X_all[n+1:2*n, :]
    ytest = y_all[n+1:2*n]
    X = X_all[1:n, :]
    y = y_all[1:n]

    L = maximum(real(eigvals(X' * X / n)))

    # Iteration details
    tostore = 1:div(n, 10):(number_of_passes * n)
    tostore_set = Set(tostore)

    # --- SGD ---
    w = zeros(d)
    wave = zeros(d)
    functionval_sc = Float64[]
    functionval_sc_test = Float64[]

    maxiter_sto = number_of_passes * n
    for iter in 1:maxiter_sto
        if iter in tostore_set
            push!(functionval_sc, mean(log.(1.0 .+ exp.(-y .* (X * w)))) + mu/2 * sum(w.^2))
            push!(functionval_sc_test, mean(log.(1.0 .+ exp.(-ytest .* (Xtest * w)))))
        end

        it = rand(rng, 1:n)
        temp = dot(X[it, :], w) * y[it]
        step = 1.0 / (R2 * sqrt(iter + 1) + mu * (iter + 1))
        grad = mu * w - X[it, :] * (y[it] / (1.0 + exp(temp)))
        w -= step * grad
        wave = (1.0 - 1.0/iter) * wave + w / iter
    end

    # --- GD ---
    w = zeros(d)
    maxiter_det = number_of_passes + 1
    functionval_sc_det = Float64[]
    functionval_sc_det_test = Float64[]

    for iter in 1:maxiter_det
        push!(functionval_sc_det, mean(log.(1.0 .+ exp.(-y .* (X * w)))) + mu/2 * sum(w.^2))
        push!(functionval_sc_det_test, mean(log.(1.0 .+ exp.(-ytest .* (Xtest * w)))))

        temp = (X * w) .* y
        grad = mu * w - (1.0 / n) * X' * (y ./ (1.0 .+ exp.(temp)))
        w -= (1.0 / L) * grad
    end

    # --- SAGA ---
    w = zeros(d)
    functionval_saga = Float64[]
    functionval_saga_test = Float64[]

    temp = (X * w) .* y
    zs = X' .* (-y ./ (1.0 .+ exp.(temp)))' .+ mu * w
    meanzs = mean(zs, dims=2)[:, 1]

    maxiter_saga = number_of_passes * n * 2
    # SAGA stores values at the same indices but we only monitor up to 4*number_of_passes*n in Matlab
    tostore_saga_set = Set(1:div(n, 10):(number_of_passes * n))

    optvalue = 0.0
    for iter in 1:maxiter_saga
        if iter in tostore_saga_set
            push!(functionval_saga, mean(log.(1.0 .+ exp.(-y .* (X * w)))) + mu/2 * sum(w.^2))
            push!(functionval_saga_test, mean(log.(1.0 .+ exp.(-ytest .* (Xtest * w)))))
        end

        if iter == maxiter_saga
            optvalue = mean(log.(1.0 .+ exp.(-y .* (X * w)))) + mu/2 * sum(w.^2)
        end

        it = rand(rng, 1:n)
        temp = dot(X[it, :], w) * y[it]
        gradloc = mu * w - X[it, :] * (y[it] / (1.0 + exp(temp)))

        w -= (1.0 / (3.0 * R2)) * (gradloc - zs[:, it] + meanzs)
        meanzs += (gradloc - zs[:, it]) / n
        zs[:, it] = gradloc
    end

    return (
        tostore = collect(tostore) ./ n,
        sc_train = functionval_sc,
        sc_test = functionval_sc_test,
        saga_train = functionval_saga,
        saga_test = functionval_saga_test,
        gd_train = functionval_sc_det,
        gd_test = functionval_sc_det_test,
        optvalue = optvalue
    )
end
```

```{julia}
res_low = run_experiment(2000)
res_high = run_experiment(20000)
```

```{julia}
fig = Figure(size=(1200, 900), fontsize=18)

# Row 1: n = 1000
ax1 = Axis(fig[1, 1], xlabel="effective passes", ylabel=L"\log_{10}[F(\theta_t) - F(\theta_*)]",
           title="Training objective - n = 1000", limits=(0, 50, -10, -0.5))
lines!(ax1, res_low.tostore, log10.(max.(res_low.sc_train .- res_low.optvalue, 1e-12)), color=blue, linewidth=2, label="SGD")
lines!(ax1, res_low.tostore, log10.(max.(res_low.saga_train .- res_low.optvalue, 1e-12)), color=red, linewidth=2, label="SAGA")
lines!(ax1, 0:50, log10.(max.(res_low.gd_train .- res_low.optvalue, 1e-12)), color=:black, linewidth=2, label="GD")
axislegend(ax1, position=:rb)

ax2 = Axis(fig[1, 2], xlabel="effective passes", ylabel=L"F_{test}(\theta_t)",
           title="Expected risk - n = 1000", limits=(0, 50, 0.4, 0.7))
lines!(ax2, res_low.tostore, res_low.sc_test, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="SGD")
lines!(ax2, res_low.tostore, res_low.saga_test, color=red, linewidth=2, label="SAGA")
lines!(ax2, 0:50, res_low.gd_test, color=:black, linewidth=2, label="GD")
axislegend(ax2, position=:rt)

# Row 2: n = 10000
ax3 = Axis(fig[2, 1], xlabel="effective passes", ylabel=L"\log_{10}[F(\theta_t) - F(\theta_*)]",
           title="Training objective - n = 10000", limits=(0, 50, -10, -0.5))
lines!(ax3, res_high.tostore, log10.(max.(res_high.sc_train .- res_high.optvalue, 1e-12)), color=blue, linewidth=2, label="SGD")
lines!(ax3, res_high.tostore, log10.(max.(res_high.saga_train .- res_high.optvalue, 1e-12)), color=red, linewidth=2, label="SAGA")
lines!(ax3, 0:50, log10.(max.(res_high.gd_train .- res_high.optvalue, 1e-12)), color=:black, linewidth=2, label="GD")
axislegend(ax3, position=:rb)

ax4 = Axis(fig[2, 2], xlabel="effective passes", ylabel=L"F_{test}(\theta_t)",
           title="Expected risk - n = 10000", limits=(0, 50, 0.4, 0.7))
lines!(ax4, res_high.tostore, res_high.sc_test, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="SGD")
lines!(ax4, res_high.tostore, res_high.saga_test, color=red, linewidth=2, label="SAGA")
lines!(ax4, 0:50, res_high.gd_test, color=:black, linewidth=2, label="GD")
axislegend(ax4, position=:rt)

fig
```
